ticket_title: Update Lifecycle Metrics: Add process_parent and account_type Tags to otel.process. Metrics

test_cases.name: TC-1: NewActivation emits process_parent=activation and account_type=new across all 5 metrics [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RTGO env with OTel telemetry receiver; NewActivation flow available; account is NewAccount. | Test Data: activationType=NewActivation, accountType=NewAccount, role=Store Rep, storeType=COR, IMEI=valid TAC

steps.action: Trigger a complete NewActivation flow in RTGO from start to completion.
Capture all otel.process.* events from the telemetry receiver.
Inspect process_parent and account_type tags on each captured event.
steps.expected: All otel.process.* metrics include process_parent=activation and account_type=new.

test_cases.name: TC-2: UpgradeDevice flow emits process_parent=upgrade for all lifecycle metrics [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RTGO env; existing subscriber eligible for upgrade; ExistingAccount context available. | Test Data: activationType=UpgradeDevice, accountType=ExistingAccount, IMEI=valid TAC, role=Store Rep, storeType=COR

steps.action: Trigger a device upgrade flow in RTGO.
Capture all otel.process.* events during the flow.
Inspect process_parent and account_type tags on each event.
steps.expected: All otel.process.* metrics include process_parent=upgrade and account_type=existing.

test_cases.name: TC-3: Standalone bill-payment defaults to process_parent=bill-payment and account_type=existing [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RTGO env; payment started without a parent activation (parentProcessId is null). | Test Data: processType=standalone-payment, role=Store Rep, storeType=COR

steps.action: Trigger a standalone bill-payment flow in RTGO (not as a child of an activation).
Capture otel.process.started from the telemetry receiver.
Inspect the process_parent and account_type tags on the event.
steps.expected: process_parent=bill-payment and account_type=existing are emitted. Tags are absent from subsequent unrelated processes (cleared in finally block).
